title: Update 0.05 - Complete Redesign
detail: 🎨 Pink & black theme applied. ⚡ 10x performance boost with optimized rendering. 🎯 Custom grey ball cursor with glow effect added. 📱 New multi-page layout with side navigation hotbar. 🔍 Smart search that works with URLs and Google searches. 🎬 Smooth load-in animations throughout. 🖥️ Browser-based UI design. All pages accessible from the hotbar.

title: Hotfix 0.05.1 - Proxy 404 handling
detail: Fixed an issue where some proxied sites returned GitHub Pages 404 content. Proxy now detects remote 4xx errors and shows a clear error page with a link to open the original site. Added logging for failed fetches.

title: Feature 0.06 - Emulator Proxy
detail: Added a fullscreen emulator overlay that loads proxied sites inside an iframe with a top toolbar (close, reload, open original, back/forward). Pre-checks remote responses and falls back to opening the original site if blocked.

title: Hotfix 0.06.1 - CSP & Framebusting Stripping
detail: Stripped Content-Security-Policy meta tags and removed common frame-busting inline scripts/attributes so social platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X) are more likely to load inside the emulator. Note: some sites may still block embedding or break due to cross-origin restrictions.

title: Update 0.04 - Bug Fixes & Optimization
detail: Fixed critical performance issues. Optimized lazy loading and caching. Improved proxy engine stability. Enhanced error handling and user feedback.

title: Update 0.03 - UI Refinements
detail: Refined button transitions and hover effects. Improved responsive design for mobile devices. Enhanced visual hierarchy and readability.

title: Update 0.02 - Performance Enhancement
detail: Fixed lots of bugs. Improved overall performance. Enhanced the UI with better spacing and animations.

title: Taby Proxy Launched v0.01
detail: Created a new browser proxy website with sleek design, hotbar navigation, and built-in proxy engine. Initial release with core functionality.
